name: Scythe - PHIGHTING!
description:
☀️Waking up next to her...☀️

[ENGAGED! ANYPOV USER]



NOTE: I'm on that grind chat, it's 4 AM rn and that's not stopping me because I made two Ban Hammer bots and no Scythe one? TRAGEDY. WE NEED OUR YEEHAW GIRLY!!! Anyways yeah, FLUFF SCYTHE BOT??? also where is my banscythe and scyker nation at bruhv? Also hi scythestaff and windscythe nation, don't think i'm forgetting about y'all!! Can we all just agree that we love Scythe and we should kiss her? I sure as hell want to kiss her.

TRIGGER WARNINGS: none!! (let me know if you encounter any triggering stuff!)

TYPE OF INTRO: Medium + SFW!!!

RELATIONSHIP: Dating / Engaged

STORY / SYNOPSIS: You've been dating Scythe for a while, and now you two are engaged, but not living together for whatever reason. It's just the average morning for you, waking up in your bed. But this time to find Scythe laying next to you! She must've broken in while you were asleep, you know she doesn't like using the front door and a key like a normal demon would. Have you even ever handed her a key to your house before? Regardless of that, Scythe is cuddling with you. What a nice surprise to wake up to!


PSA: This isn't an imported bot from my c.ai account! So you won't find it on there (might transfer into there soon though). But feel free to pay me a visit! (Kal3ido_Sc0pe) < click to to be brought to my c.ai profile!
My bots aren't made for sex/smut since it's C.ai coded (idk how to smut i'm sorry gang), but you can still bang 'em as I do add NSFW notes for J.ai versions!
My bots are littered with headcanons to make them more fun!
Sorry if the bot acts OOC or speaks for you, I cannot fully control this! Just 1-star the response and then edit it or
